title: Light Middle-Eastern Chickpeas Hummus Fold
description: A tangy and fluffy vegan-friendly Middle Eastern dish made with chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, and red chilli flakes, served in a foldable flatbread.
instructions: Drain and rinse the chickpeas, and transfer them to a blender or food processor.
Add the tahini, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, cumin powder, salt, and red chilli flakes to the blender.
Blend the mixture on high speed until smooth and creamy, stopping to scrape down the sides as needed.
Add the water to the blender and continue blending until the desired consistency is reached.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the hummus to a serving bowl, and garnish with extra chickpeas or herbs if desired.
Warm the flatbread according to package instructions.
Spread a layer of hummus onto the flatbread, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the flatbread in half to enclose the hummus, and serve immediately.
